GM:(0,0,0)  R:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  S:(1/2,1/2,0)  T:(0,1/2,1/2)  U:(1/2,0,1/2)  X:(1/2,0,0)  Y:(0,1/2,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM:(0,0,0)  E:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  A:(1/2,0,1/2)  D:(0,1/2,1/2)  C:(1/2,1/2,0)  Y:(1/2,0,0)  B:(0,0,1/2)  Z:(0,1/2,0)
GM1+  GM1-  GM2+  GM2-  GM4  GM6  GM3  GM5  (R)E1-E1+  (R)E2-E2+  (R)E4E6  (R)E3E5  (S)A1+  (S)A1-  (S)A2+  (S)A2-  (S)A4  (S)A6  (S)A3  (S)A5  (T)D1-D1+  (T)D2-D2+  (T)D4D6  (T)D3D5  (U)C1-C1+  (U)C2-C2+  (U)C4C6  (U)C3C5  (X)Y1+  (X)Y1-  (X)Y2+  (X)Y2-  (X)Y4  (X)Y6  (X)Y3  (X)Y5  (Y)B1+  (Y)B1-  (Y)B2+  (Y)B2-  (Y)B4  (Y)B6  (Y)B3  (Y)B5  Z1-Z1+  Z2-Z2+  Z4Z6  Z3Z5
